===[[Pokémon Stadium]]===
Lt. Surge appears in [[Pokémon Stadium]] as the third Gym Leader the player faces during the [[Gym Leader Castle]] challenge. During Round 2, he also uses Pokémon outside his specialty type to counter any {{type|Ground}} Pokémon used against him.
